message:
test(escape-parser): add 41 tests for terminal escape sequence types (wa-fwhqe)

Cover OneBased construction/conversion/esc-param parsing, Action::append_to
coalescing behavior, ControlCode C0/C1 values, Action/SixelData/
ShortDeviceControl/DeviceControlMode Display and Debug impls, Sixel::dimensions
(explicit, computed, repeat, carriage return), and Clone/PartialEq traits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
